decisions.rationale: Source text p009_c0007 names '5-min. Q101 travel time savings' as a benefit of Recommendation #1B, directly naming the Q101 route.

decisions.rationale: Source text p010_c0007 states 'Benefits 45 express and 10 local buses in PM peak hr' as a benefit of Recommendation #2 of the QBB Bus Priority Study.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Reduce bus delay • Benefits 45 express and 10 local buses in PM peak hr • Reduce bus sideswipe crashes attempting to merge left
